Modules for command handling, version control ignore rules, project configuration, and documentation.

## Folders
- **[pebble](pebble/README.md)**: Modules for command handling and a file declaring a namespace package using `pkg_resources`.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files and directories to ignore in version control for a Python project.
- **[pyproject.toml](pyproject.toml.md)**: Configuration for the Pebble Commander project, specifying dependencies and scripts.
- **[README.rst](README.rst.md)**: Documentation for the Pebble Commander library in the pebble-firmware codebase.
